response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist engineer (~19 years across web, backend, and high-throughput systems) whose current role includes directly relevant MCP code-generator and agentic-workflow infrastructure work. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python. His staff-level breadth, cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and strong teaching/workshop track record suggest customer-facing potential, but the core GenAI depth the role demands is not demonstrated.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic-workflow tooling experience in current role, directly matching key technologies
Long production engineering track record with TypeScript/Node, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and low-latency high-throughput systems
Demonstrated mentorship and communication skills via workshops, conference talks, and multi-module courses
concerns: Roughly 1 year of AI-related work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Python is absent from the skill set, and designing AI systems on cloud platforms is not evidenced

key_factors.factor: AI production experience far below 8-year requirement
No RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation evidence
